findings.title: Hardcoded AWS access key in source code
findings.evidence: Line 3: const AWS_ACCESS_KEY = "AKIAJW6PNQ4R7TLZ5KYM"; Key is passed to uploadDirect() function on line 16 and will be shipped in client-side code.

evaluator.note: Benchmark v4 multi-model panel; blind, packet-only context.
